EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} failed to view information about network policies on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is deleting network policies on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} modified the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about network policies on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} created the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to delete network policies on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is deleting the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted network policies on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to modify a network policy on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} viewed information about the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about a network policy on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is creating the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is modifying the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to create a network policy on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to delete a network policy on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} deleted the network policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about network policies on host {event_src.host}
